essence: Advises organisations on strategies to reduce environmental impact and meet sustainability goals.

identity.title: Sustainability Consultant
identity.summary: Develops carbon reduction plans, advises on resource efficiency, and helps clients meet regulatory and voluntary sustainability targets.

salary.notes: Senior consultants and specialists in net‑zero strategy command premium rates.

qualifications: Background in sustainability, environmental science, or engineering
Experience with carbon accounting and sustainability frameworks
Strong stakeholder engagement and project management skills
Ability to translate technical analysis into business strategy

lifestyle.description: Office and client site work with frequent reporting, modelling, and stakeholder engagement; consultancy pace and travel common.
